author: mnowotnik
description: Use js files or snippets to code your own quick and dirty plugins.

manifest.author: mnowotnik
manifest.description: Use ts and js modules or js snippets to code your own plugins
manifest.name: User Plugins

name: User Plugins

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- the scripts can be now JS Obsidian plugins or compiled TS Obsidian plugins
- add better notifications on errors
- add more helper methods: openFile, notify, getAllFolders
- deprecated `passedModules` and `helpers`. Use global `require` and `plugin.api` instead

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Adds #1 - you can now apply scripts and snippets without reloading

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- removed dependency on path and require
- logging with [obsidian-user-plugins] prefix
- do not crash on errors, log and continue
- now works on mobile

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: - Added `passedModules` member to the passed `plugin` object. `passedModules` gives access to the `obsidian` module. The reason for this change is that using `require` inside scripts is impossible.
